# GreenFundr

GreenFundr is a UK-based specialist advisory that helps climate tech SMEs win government grant funding, including Innovate UK and Horizon Europe programmes.

## What we do

* Grant funding landscape mapping (GrantMatch Scan)
* Consortium architecture and bid leadership for multi-partner proposals
* Grant-readiness roadmapping for teams preparing for future calls
* Bespoke funding strategy advisory for boards and leadership teams

## Who we work with

UK-based climate tech SMEs with R&D or commercialisation projects, particularly in hydrogen aviation, green hydrogen infrastructure, future mobility, clean energy systems, and net zero technologies.

## Key facts

* Founded by Ben Silver, who has reviewed £45M+ in climate tech grant proposals
* Programmes covered: Innovate UK Smart Grants, Innovate UK Investor Partnerships, Horizon Europe Clean Aviation, Net Zero Hydrogen Fund, UK Government LHSIFT and AFCAD programmes
* Geographic scope: UK and European funding programmes
* Engagement types: fixed-fee, milestone-based, or bespoke advisory

## Contact

Website: https://greenfundr.com
Email: sales@greenfundr.com
